programme.title: Hector and the Search for Happiness
programme.desc: Newly divorced Sarah and her daughter Elissa seek a fresh start in a new town. But when startling and unexplainable events begin to happen, they're pulled into a mystery more dangerous than they ever imagined.

programme.title: The Big Wedding
programme.desc: A modern family tries to survive a weekend wedding celebration that has the potential to become a full-blown fiasco in this uproarious romantic comedy with an all-star cast.

programme.title: Season of the Witch
programme.desc: His faith broken by years of battle as a crusader, Behmam, a medieval knight, returns to central Europe to find his homeland decimated by the Black Plague.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Five Diamond World Poker Classic Part 1 of 3
programme.desc: Season XIV of the World Poker Tour continues at the luxurious Bellagio in Las Vegas, where WPT champion and chip leader Kevin Eyster competes against Jake Schwartz.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Five Diamond World Poker Classic
programme.desc: Season XIV of the World Poker Tour continues at the luxurious Bellagio in Las Vegas, where WPT champion and chip leader Kevin Eyster competes against Jake Schwartz.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Five Diamond World Poker Classic - $6.2 Million Pot
programme.desc: Season XIV of the World Poker Tour continues at the luxurious Bellagio in Las Vegas, where WPT champion Kevin Eyster remains the chip leader. He competes against Bill Jennings and Ben Yu for the lion's share of the $6.2 million prize pool.

programme.title: Orgy of the Dead
programme.desc: A couple driving to a cemetery looking for inspiration for a horror story encounters the dancing dead.

programme.title: The Torture Chamber Of Dr. Sadism
programme.desc: German gothic horror with psychedelic visuals.

programme.title: The House on Straw Hill
programme.desc: A paranoid writer is unable to get started on his second novel. He hires a secretary and then his troubles really begin.

programme.title: Code of Silence
programme.desc: When a stakeout marred by mob interference results in the death of an innocent bystander and a police cover-up, a Chicago detective is forced to adhere to his own personal code of ethics in an effort to rid the Windy City of its Warring crime factions.

programme.title: War (2007)
programme.desc: A full-throttle, martial arts thriller, WAR stars Jet Li and Jason Statham as two adversaries set on a violent collision course in the Asian mob underground.

programme.title: Lionheart
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars as Lyon Gaultier, a member of the French Foreign Legion who deserts his post in order to come to America and help the family of his murdered brother. But crossing the U.S. without a penny to his name proves difficult.

programme.title: Deadly Patient
programme.desc: When Dr. Hillary Spenser saves the life of Gregory Lipton, he becomes dangerously obsessed with her, threatening the good doctor and all those in her life.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: When Patricia is called to identify a body, she’s shocked to find her mirror image lying dead on a gurney. Determined to find out more about her surprise ‘twin’ and simultaneously, help her mother clear her father's name.

programme.title: Living in Fear
programme.desc: A newly married bride travels to her husband's hometown for the reading of his father's will. When she discovers that the townspeople suspect her husband of a murder committed twenty years ago, she has her doubts about the man she's committed her life to.

programme.title: Earthling
programme.desc: After a mysterious atmospheric event, a small group of people wake up to realize that their entire lives have been a lie. They are in fact aliens disguised as humans. Now they have to make a choice. Live amongst men, or try to find a way back home.

programme.title: Futra Days
programme.desc: After undergoing an experimental time travel "process" that sends a man into his future, he investigates the man he has become, by engaging in a romance with his future self's girlfriend in a mind-bending reality.

programme.title: Extraterrestrial
programme.desc: A group of friends on a weekend trip to a cabin in the woods find themselves terrorized by alien visitors. Starring: Brittany Allen, Freddie Stroma, Jesse Moss

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Argentina
programme.desc: A dairy farmer drives his Mad Max style lorry - half bus, half tractor - through swamped lagoons to deliver his farm's milk.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Benin
programme.desc: Travellers make a white knuckle journey to cross \\"The River Of Death\\".

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Ethiopia
programme.desc: Travel on the oldest and most dangerous train in the world as it battles derailments and landslides while snaking through Ethiopia.

programme.title: Deadliest Journeys: Madagascar Red Island
programme.desc: The only passage to the Vanilla Coast has the well earned nickname \\"the road from hell\\". Merchants travel through one of the deadliest national roads in the world to sell their goods.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Buffalo Air
programme.desc: Rookie co-pilot Scott faces his worst nightmare when a faltering Curtiss C-46 Commando engine and low fog force a scary landing.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Pre-Christmas Rush
programme.desc: Christmas is just around the corner, but Buffalo's crucial food and mail runs come to a halt. An engine seizure strands Scott, AJ and the C-46 plane, creating a chaotic chain reaction.

programme.title: Ice Pilots: Birthday from Hell
programme.desc: A string of bad luck turns chief pilot Arnie's 66th birthday run into the flight from hell - and threatens to spoil his naughty birthday surprise.

programme.title: Poltergeist
programme.desc: At first, the spirits that invade the Freelings' home seem like playful children. But then they turn angry. And when 10-year-old Carol Anne is pulled from this world into another, Steve and Diane Freeling turn to an exorcist.

programme.title: The Theatre Bizarre
programme.desc: A modern horror omnibus inspired by the over-the-top shocks of Paris' early 20th century 'Theatre du Grand Guignol'. Enola Penny sneaks into an abandoned theater and witnesses six bizarre tales.

programme.title: York Witches Society
programme.desc: When an elite society unleashes an ancient evil upon the world, a young woman, the descendant of witches, must use her powers to save them all.

programme.title: Christmas Matchmakers
programme.desc: Two hard-working executive assistants arrange for their bosses to fall in love during the holidays.

programme.title: A Christmas Tree Miracle
programme.desc: A warm-hearted Christmas tale to remind us that in the holiday season, the best gifts in life are the simple ones, and that miracles do happen, if you believe.

programme.title: All I Want For Christmas
programme.desc: One Christmas a boy wishes he could change places and his dream comes true! But he soon discovers that without his parents and friends it's actually a curse. The only problem is - can he reverse his disastrous wish and get his family back again.

programme.title: 1982 FIFA World Cup
programme.desc: Watch the highlights from the match between Germany FR and France played at Ramón Sánchez-Pizjuán, Seville.

programme.title: 1990 FIFA World Cup
programme.desc: Football entertainment for fans! Watch documentaries, original series and select live matches as well as historic moments from the FIFA World Cup™️, FIFA Club World Cup™️, FIFA Women's World Cup™️ and more.

programme.title: The Best of FIFA World Cup
programme.desc: A showcase of the tournament's top goals, assists, and award-winning moments from Spain 1982.

programme.title: 3 Days to Kill
programme.desc: A dying Secret Service agent (Kevin Costner) who wants to reconnect with his estranged daughter (Hailee Steinfeld) is offered a potentially lifesaving drug in exchange for completing one final mission.

programme.title: Man on a Ledge
programme.desc: While trying to convince a disgraced ex-cop (Sam Worthington) to come in from a high-rise ledge, a police negotiator (Elizabeth Banks) begins to realize that the man has an ulterior motive.

programme.title: Nerve
programme.desc: Partnered with a mysterious stranger (Dave Franco), a high school senior (Emma Roberts) joins a popular online game that dares players to perform increasingly dangerous stunts.

programme.title: 900 Seconds with...
programme.desc: The greatest ever snooker player talks about his plans for Snooker 900 and how this snooker format is especially positive for his mental health.

programme.title: Snooker 900

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt for Cursed Treasure begins in Staffordshire, England, where the onset of a violent storm announced the discovery of the largest Anglo-Saxon hoard ever uncovered. But was the storm an omen of things to come?

programme.title: Cursed Treasures
programme.desc: The hunt for Cursed Treasure takes us to the Bay of Naples and the doomed Roman city of Pompeii, where items stolen by tourists have created misery and misfortune.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Historian Dan Jones visits the South East of England, home to Britain's greatest defensive fortress: Dover Castle.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones visits Lancaster Castle to explore its grisly history of crime and punishment, including the infamous Witches trials and the martyrdom of the Jesuit priest Saint Edmund Arrowsmith.

programme.title: What?
programme.desc: During her Italian vacation, a young and beautiful American tourist finds herself as a guest in a coastal villa inhabited by some odd people.

programme.title: Lady Libertine
programme.desc: A young aristocrat, Charlie, meets a cross-dressing girl, Frances, who escaped from a brothel. He takes her into his home and they become lovers.

programme.title: Confessions of A Sex Maniac
programme.desc: A sex-crazed young architect decides that he wants to design a building shaped like the perfect breast, so he searches all over London for a woman who bears the perfect model.

programme.title: Little Miss Innocence
programme.desc: Wealthy exec Rick Engels brings two young hitchhikers to his mansion for his desires. What starts as an ideal situation turns chaotic when the women refuse to leave and prove more than he can handle, spiraling into unexpected complications.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: A woman stands to lose her beloved home if she doesn't remove the filth and animal carcasses inside. A teenager demands that his parents clean up their stash of Halloween items and other assorted junk.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Deeply depressed ex-cop Dennis has retreated to his room because of the clutter in his and his wife's home, prompting Adult Protective Services to intervene.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: After hoarding herself out of her home, Judy began taking over her friend Linda's house. Now, Linda wants her out. Judy must try and clean up before she's left homeless.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: A San Francisco woman lives in a hillside home with $1 million worth of teddy bears. A man's family pleads with him to clean up his home.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Over the past two decades, Carol has hoarded her husband's home. With the mansion threatened to be condemned, the family unites to try to save the house and confront Carol about her behaviour.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: After telling too many wild stories, Bert is no longer believed when he discovers Cyril plans to pave the forest into a parking lot. With no one trusting him, Bert must find proof quickly before Cyril carries out his destructive plan.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: When Cedric and Sophia hear that royalty will visit Evergreen Forest, Bert dreams of becoming a knight. Meanwhile, Cyril wants knighthood for power, leading both into humorous efforts to impress the royal visitors during their stay.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril schemes to buy the Evergreen Standard by cutting off its supplies with help from Mr. Knox, who demands payment in gold. Bert tries to save the paper by finding a way to secure resources, leading to a risky plan to outsmart Cyril.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: A pro baseball team visits Evergreen Forest and seeks a new player. Bert and Cedric both compete for the spot, straining their friendship as rivalry grows. In the end, they must decide what matters more, success or their bond.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril offers Bert a deal to become the face of his new cologne line. Tempted by fame and money, Bert considers the offer, but soon realizes the cost of endorsing Cyril’s schemes and must choose between integrity and success.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cyril panics when his betrayed partner Karl Snarl returns for revenge. Meanwhile, Bert discovers an old helicopter, and Melissa must overcome her fear of heights to help save her friends during a dangerous confrontation.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: After losing power due to unpaid bills, Cyril plans to build a dam to control energy in the forest. Meanwhile, Bert and Cedric stay with Aunt Gertie, whose strict ways test their patience while bigger trouble brews outside.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Cousin Bentley visits the Raccoons, bringing his usual quirks along. Meanwhile, Cyril seeks to regain his youth using a questionable potion, leading to chaos as his reckless attempt causes unexpected and humorous consequences.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Bert and Melissa explore echo caverns and discover strange cave art. Cyril, seeing profit potential, enters the art world and drives up prices. The gang must decide whether art is about value or meaning as greed takes over.

programme.title: The Raccoons
programme.desc: Believing Cyril is dying, Bert spends his savings on a tribute monument. When Cyril learns he is fine, he exploits the situation to sabotage the Evergreen Standard, forcing Bert to recover from his costly mistake quickly.

programme.desc: The teams must tackle a challenge in order to get the ingredients they need to cook four different lamb dishes.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Vanishing Point
programme.desc: In 2003, 32-year-old mother of three Sara Neithe vanished from the Hauraki Plains. Neither Sara nor her car have been seen since. Police suspect that Sara has been murdered but without a crime scene, they have been unable to advance the case.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: The Lie of the Land
programme.desc: Sue Nicholson and Deb Webber investigate one of the most complex and intriguing cases ever featured - did Waikato man Jason Dark commit suicide or was he murdered, as his family believes?

programme.title: Sensing Murder: When The Trail Goes Cold
programme.desc: This episodes involves the disappearance of 62-year-old Kaye Stewart, a woman who went missing while on a short walk on June 13th, 2005.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Looking for Justice
programme.desc: This week, for the first time ever, the prime suspect in a murder enquiry has turned to Sensing Murder for help.

programme.title: Sensing Murder: Lost for Words
programme.desc: Spirited teenager Jayne Furlong dreamed of becoming a child psychologist - instead, she ended up a prostitute. In 1993, 17 year old Jayne vanished from her patch on Auckland's Karangahape Road.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Civil War Spirits
programme.desc: The site of the bloodiest battle of the Revolutionary War sets the stage for an unforgettable investigation by TAPS.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Essex County Penitentiary
programme.desc: The TAPS team is joined by Destination Truthhost Josh Gates as the team returns to Essex County, New Jersey to investigate a notorious penitentiary with a horrifying past.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Judgment Day
programme.desc: TAPS calls in Bruce Tango, father of Dave Tango, to help investigate a place close to his heart, the Union County Courthouse, a historic property in Elizabeth, NJ.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Little Drummer Boy
programme.desc: TAPS has received an urgent call for help from a Chicago community center whose patrons are being chased away by a variety of menacing spirits.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: A Bat Out of Hell
programme.desc: This week TAPS heads to Thousand Island, NY to investigate a 4-acre private island and is joined by the \\" King of Rock and Roll\\" himself, Meatloaf.

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas
programme.desc: Andi is uncomfortable with Gary's latest actions. Sabrina gives Maurice some advice to assist with his new troubles. Zac is confused by a co-worker's advances. (S2, ep9)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas
programme.desc: Olonzo approaches Maurice again. Gary becomes obsessed with reconciling with Andi. Tensions grow as Hayden threatens Zac. (S2, ep10)

programme.title: Tyler Perry's Sistas
programme.desc: Gary forces a conversation with Andi. Zac is pursued by a new love interest. Later, Gary gets drunk and his anger boils over. (S2, ep11)

programme.title: The Game: Parachutes...
programme.desc: Melanie and Derwin expereience trouble in paradise when Melanie takes it upon herself to swab DJ, only to find out the baby isn't Derwin's.

programme.title: The Game: ...Beach Chairs
programme.desc: Melanie deals with the backlash of having told Derwin the results of the DNA test, only to learn that the results are incorrect.

programme.title: The Game: The Confession Episode
programme.desc: Melanie musters the courage to reveal the mistaken DNA test results of Baby DJ, further driving a wedge in her marriage and sending Janay on the warpath.

programme.title: The Game: The Wing King
programme.desc: Malik continues his downward sprial of behavior, culminating in a drunken rage and assault against a police officer. He is arrested.

programme.title: The Game: It Was All Good Just A Week Ago
programme.desc: After assaulting a police offcer and getting a DUI, Malik is assured by his people that he is not going to jail. He later learns that the Saber's owner is filling him with a false sense of security in order to kick him off the team.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Satan's Soldier
programme.desc: Mark and Kim can't sleep through the racket caused by unseen forces in their central Indiana home. When PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger discover what appears to be blood in the basement, they investigate a history of violence in the home.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Dark Practice
programme.desc: Brenda is terrified by a dark hooded figure spotted in her West Virginia home. The same entity allegedly tormented her late husband. PRS and Psychic/Medium Michelle Belanger help Brenda before she slips into the same abyss as her late husband.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Haunted Ranch
programme.desc: PRS saddles up to a remote ranch in Hunt, Texas where black shadows are being spotted and animals harmed. What's more, a mysterious crop circle has formed on the property and the horses refuse to cross it.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Paranormal Detour
programme.desc: With time off between cases, Ryan suggests to the PRS team they choose a random town to investigate. They roll into St. Helens, Oregon, home of Twilight, where they learn about the long history of the paranormal in the area.

programme.title: Paranormal State: First Contact
programme.desc: Washington State, a hotbed of unexplained paranormal activity. Between possible UFOs in the sky and winged creatures in the woods, Ryan and his team are forced to face their fears and deal with the question: Are we truly alone in the universe?

programme.title: Paranormal State: Church of the Damned
programme.desc: Jason and his family can no longer do renovations of an abandoned Kansas church, especially after they found their father in the basement crying and frightened because of the menacing activity.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Fire
programme.desc: Christina has been experiencing paranormal activity ever since her father and step-mother were murdered near Columbus, OH last year. PRS and psychic/medium?Chip Coffey delve into a open murder case and wind up exposing a family divide.

programme.title: Paranormal State: Spirits of the Slave Dungeon
programme.desc: Ryan books a two-night case in a real haunted jail in Charleston, SC, but PRS soon realizes the spirits themselves are being held there against their will and subjected to an unjust form of torture.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Name
programme.desc: Ryan Buell and company set out on one of their most dangerous cases to date - to help a single mother who is experiencing paranormal activity in a home that was once the site of brutal murder.

programme.title: Paranormal State: The Asylum
programme.desc: PRS explores a New York State Prison that was once a mental asylum. Ryan and his team go behind bars to uncover the institution's paranormal past and present.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Hill House_PT1
programme.desc: What was once a private home before becoming a sanctuary for the elderly, the abandoned Hill House is now an eerie shadow of its former glory, that houses empty rooms, strange noises and a plethora of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Hill House_PT2
programme.desc: Part one saw the team seemingly getting stalked by something, and in this part it shows its hand.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Village Church Farm
programme.desc: A museum like no other, this small collection of antiquated buildings is said to be the home of several spirits. The team get more than they bargained for as objects move; strange noises are caught on camera and the best EVP response to date.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Old Nick Theatre
programme.desc: Once a prison and a police station and now a theatre the Old Nick is famous for its unexplained occurrences. Fred decides to summon up some extra help while objects move and something wants to make itself known.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Black Country Living Museum
programme.desc: The team have a whole village to investigate with results that amazed the all. With a playful spirit communicating through the Ouija board and the EVP machine at the same time the team seem to have their first two-way conversation with the dead.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Lyceum Theatre
programme.desc: The Lyceum Theatre in Crewe is known for its paranormal activity and in this episode the team take the fight right to phantoms that lurk in its darkness with some frightening consequences.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 12
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Merry-Go-Round, Red Eyed Creature, Used Car Salesman, Surveillance Camera, Graffiti.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 13
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Warning, Bus Stop, The Cure, The Guardian, The Gift.

programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: The Nightmare, The Stalker, The Impossible Car Dream, The Dresser, The Burial.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 2
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Writer's Agent, Crypt Ghost, The Doll, Hubert's Curse, Shared Vision.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 8
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Creepy Comics, Louie the Dip, The Wailing, The Landlady, Curse.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 6
programme.desc: This episode features the following cases: Red Line, Two Sisters, Eclipse, The Ice Box, The Gathering.

programme.title: Dynasty: Blake's Blindness
programme.desc: Blake remains blinded following the explosion; Nick asks Krystle to divorce her husband and marry him; Blake investigates Nick's past; Alexis is determined to drive Krystle from Denver.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Hearing
programme.desc: Fallon confesses her love to Nick, but he is interested in Krystle; Blake's attempts to bring gangster Logan Rhinewood before a Crime Committee hearing are thwarted; Sammy Jo tells Alexis she knows her secret; Blake receives an anonymous letter.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Iago Syndrome
programme.desc: Krystle says goodbye to Nick and leaves Denver; Blake offers to adopt Jeff; Cecil blackmails Claudia; Nick accepts Blake's explanation of his brother's death.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Party
programme.desc: At a party in her honor, Sammy Jo embarrasses the Carringtons and reveals to Fallon that Blake is not her father; Jeff leaves the party with Claudia; Blake tells Krystle his eyesight is restored; Fallon is left unconscious after a car accident.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Baby
programme.desc: Fallon gives birth to a son; Alexis offers Sammy Jo $25,000 to leave Denver; Jeff and Claudia make love; Krystle accuses Alexis of killing her baby; Alexis learns Krystle and Blake are not legally married.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Execution
programme.desc: Not knowing when, where, or how a dangerous adversary will strike, Jim Phelps and Cinnamon use themselves as human quarries.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Play
programme.desc: With Phelps and Rollin as the leading men, the Impossible Missions Force stages an anti-American play which could prove to be a strong propaganda device for the enemy.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Cardinal
programme.desc: An army commander (played by guest star Theodore Bikel) plots to become dictator by imprisoning an influential cardinal and using a look-alike actor for a public endorsement.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Elixir
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force offers a "fountain of youth" to the vain and dictatorial widow (guest star Ruth Roman) of the late president of a small South American country in order to depose her.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Exchange
programme.desc: Cinnamon is captured and the enemy discovers the one thing that would unmask her identity and expose the Impossible Mission Force.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Half Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: 1970s Z-Flex Jimmy Plumer Poolrider skateboard with artwork by Doug Smith; Kevlar bulletproof vest, ballistic facemask and a helmet used by S.W.A.T. teams; a pair of 1990s racing pocket bikes capable of going 80 mph.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Brew-Phoria
programme.desc: Ton and Allen go all in for an electric car, but with the batteries missing, a pricey refurb is their only shot at a profit. Will a home brewing system and high-end air rifles help soften the blow, or will they take a big loss?

programme.title: Auction Hunters: You Got Served
programme.desc: After a crushing defeat, the guys leave an auction empty handed and scramble to find new merchandise at a yard sale. But questionable antique tennis rackets and an ancient special effects box may not earn them a cent.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hidden Hot Wheels
programme.desc: Ton and Allen challenge a big time auction buyer on his home turf. The guys uncover a 1969 Chevelle Malibu muscle car and a single-shot pistol designed to aid Allied resistance fighters during WWII.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hula Moola
programme.desc: Ton and Allen jet to the Hawaiian islands where they're joined by a feisty new female assistant! The team uncovers a pair of James Bond-style gadgets designed for high-speed underwater travel and a vintage sled.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Night of the Digging Dead
programme.desc: A custom-built shark cage; 1900s pathologist's dissection toolkit; 1940s embalming pump and one of the first electric bone saws.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rock and Roll
programme.desc: An auction in Whittier gets ugly when a buyer named Big Dave tries to take it all. After some tough losses, the guys win a state of the art food truck and an off-road rock crawler with dangerous consequences.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Weapons of Past Destruction
programme.desc: Knowing that Hollywood auctions are hit-and-miss, Allen and Ton buy inexpensive lockers that contain a polygraph machine, a samurai sword and a pair of Civil War shotguns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Real Thing
programme.desc: Allen and Ton compete with a notorious deep-pocketed bidder in Oxnard, CA, and score a vintage Coca-Cola vending machine, a vintage desk and a rare 1971 GMC truck.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hook, Line & Printer
programme.desc: A last-minute auction in Norwalk proves challenging when Ton and Allen go toe-to-toe with a real life cowboy couple. When the dust settles, the guys uncover a 3D printer and a grappling hook gun they can't wait to shoot.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Territorial Ghosts
programme.desc: Witness the terror that ensues when ghosts deal with invaders on their turf.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Tormented Teens
programme.desc: Witness terrifying apparitions, and see one woman’s horrible dreams come true.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: An Invitation to Evil (Letting Them In)
programme.desc: An antique buyer brings evil home, and a demonic spirit makes a house call.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Home Possession
programme.desc: Learn how three families are dealing with properties overrun by ghosts.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: A Sense of Evil
programme.desc: Hear from terrified people who wish their sixth sense wasn’t quite so good.

programme.title: A Haunting: Evil Rises
programme.desc: After a major surgery forces Jacinda Rearick to recuperate at home, she discovers orbs in family photos. At first, Jacinda believes that they are her deceased parents watching over her. But something much more sinister is invading her home.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Haunting Of Allen House
programme.desc: Professor Mark Spencer and his wife Rebecca have just purchased the historic Allen House in Arkansas. Shortly after moving in, Rebecca comes face to face with a faceless spirit. Mark calls investigators to determine if the spirit means them harm.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Apartment
programme.desc: The Spencer’s move to a new apartment that is loud with spirits.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Unleashed
programme.desc: Soon after Randy recites an incantation from a book on witchcraft, a growling monster appears.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demon Unearthed
programme.desc: In the small town of Garden Grove, Iowa, Jennifer and Norman Rice with their son Andrew, purchase a majestic 19th century mansion. Soon after, Jennifer and Andrew begin experiencing paranormal activity while Norman is out of town on business.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: The kids come to an Earth Nation town which is occupied by the Fire Nation. But will Katara's attempts to inspire the oppressed people help them or hurt them?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka arrive at a town being terrorized by a mysterious force from the spirit world. Aang doesn't know how to help these people, and realizes he has much to learn about being Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: During the winter solstice, Aang must reach a Fire Nation temple while dodging Prince Zuko, Commander Zhao, and the Fire Sages who guard it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: When Katara's desire to master Waterbending gets the best of her, the kids find themselves on the run from pirates.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: Our heroes' friendship is tested when they meet Jet, a charismatic teenager leading a band of rebels who are fighting against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: When Aang and friends come to the rim of a giant canyon, they are asked to help guide two groups of refugees across. Aang quickly learns that this will be no easy task.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: A powerful storm brings up painful memories of the past - and puts everyone in jeopardy in the present.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: When Sokka and Katara get too sick to travel, Aang goes out on his own to find a cure for them. But he is captured by Zhao and held prisoner inside an impenetrable fortress.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives but they are so reliant that they are blind to the imminent danger they are all in.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Medical Mysteries
programme.desc: Medical Mysteries: An adrenaline junkie and her unborn baby somehow survive when their parachute fails, and a firefighter is incinerated in his bed.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Power Of The Mind
programme.desc: Power of the Mind: A housewife has a strange and sudden vision that helps to solve a murder. A man remembers every single moment of his life.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Ancient Mysteries
programme.desc: Ancient Mysteries: A girl finds a 1000-year-old skull that may prove aliens once walked the planet, and ancient stone carvings could rewrite the story of evolution.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Amazing Survival
programme.desc: Amazing Survival: Incredible stories of people who cheated death, including a man who escaped from the avalanche of debris caused by the collapse of the World Trade Center.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Man Beasts
programme.desc: Man Beasts: We're all fascinated by mysteries. But is the unexplained really unexplainable? William Shatner investigates in an attempt to find a logical explanation.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Aliens Walk Among Us
programme.desc: Stories that suggest aliens are among us, including an Arizona woman who claims to have been fathered by an alien in a top-secret government experiment.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen

programme.title: Most Haunted: Unseen

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Patrice Evra
programme.desc: Today, we’ve got a guest who has lived several lives in one. On the pitch, he was a fierce left-back who collected trophies like kids collect Pokémon cards. Off the pitch, he’s become the man of Monday mornings.

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Ben Whittaker
programme.desc: A guest who has a huge drive and work ethics and has overcome some hurdles that have possibly made him stronger. His entrances make Harry Styles look underdressed at Coachella.

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Kaya Scodelario
programme.desc: She became a household name at just 14years old, when she burst onto our screens in the groundbreaking series Skins. Since then, she’s pursued her acting dreams all the way to Hollywood — and built quite an impressive career.

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Ross Kemp
programme.desc: A courageous man who's living proof you can reinvent yourself more times than a Love Island contestant. He went from pulling pints in the Queen Vic to pulling BAFTAs for documentaries…

programme.title: Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Lucy Bronze
programme.desc: Tonight’s guest has lived that journey. From a football-loving kid to one of the world’s finest players, she’s lifted major trophies, captained teams, and become a role model for millions. Lucy Bronze welcome on the Yellow Couch.

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Charlotte Crosby
programme.desc: She first burst onto our screens on Geordie Shore—back when her biggest commitment was to Jägerbombs and fake tan. Since then she’s gone from wild nights in Newcastle towinning Celebrity Big Brother.

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Patrice Evra

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Ben Whittaker

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Kaya Scodelario

programme.title: The Yellow Couch with Jeremy Lynch - Ross Kemp

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Ricardo Godinho
programme.desc: Aliny and Ricardo Godinho had four children and a relationship history that spanned 17 years. While Aliny put her kids at the centre of everything she did, for Ricardo they were a morbid obsession, and one that would lead to a shocking, brutal crime.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Ramanodge Unmathallegadoo
programme.desc: At the age of 16, Sana Muhammad had an arranged marriage to Ramanodge Unmathallegadoo, a man almost twice her age. She managed to escape the unhappy relationship and found new love, but Ramanodge decided she would never get to enjoy her new life.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Frances Hall
programme.desc: When Frances Araiza met Bill Hall Jr, he was a 16 year old with big ideas. Fast forward three decades and they were grandparents with a multi-million dollar empire. But behind closed doors, their marriage story was heading for an explosive finale.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Faria Khan

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Steven McDowell

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Glyn Dix
programme.desc: Glyn Dix met Hazel while he was serving a life term for a brutal rape and murder. After convincing her he had been framed, the couple fell for one another. But five years after his release from prison, Glyn finally showed Hazel his true colours.

programme.desc: Linda is hoping for love when she meets Jim, but his charm lasts only as long as he doesn't drink. Unable to stay sober, Jim becomes determined to keep Linda all to himself...even if it kills her.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: The Big Bang
programme.desc: Throughout history, our nightly view of the universe has fueled our collective imagination. When it comes to the Big Bang, not even the most creative work of imagination can rival what science has revealed about the birth of the universe.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Moons of Olympis
programme.desc: These are the the Moon's of the gas giants. Each a unique and mysterious world of its own. Some have oceans of water, geysers of Sulphur or atmospheres of plastic.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Beyond Earth Orbit - The Apollo program takes bold new steps. IXV Re-entry Vehicle - Europe is working to perfect a re-entry vehicle. Galileo Satellites Lost and Found - Navigation satellites go into incorrect orbit.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Orbit

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas
programme.desc: See the sun, moon, planets, and galaxies through the eyes of intrepid machines that are blazing a trail across the solar system. A gateway to bold adventures, these cameras are delivering spectacular new cosmic vistas.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Virtual Universe
programme.desc: Our understanding of the cosmos is limited by the amount of time we have to see it. Fortunately, computer simulations can help us see how galaxies interact over millions of years, and even how dark matter structures the universe.

programme.title: Earthrise: The First Lunar Voyage
programme.desc: Interviews with Apollo 8 astronauts, their wives, mission control staff, and journalists give true insider's perspective to the space race of the late 1960's.

programme.title: Cosmic Vistas: Science and the Shuttle

programme.desc: Wildest Places explores some of the most incredible natural habitats on earth & a diverse range of wildlife.

programme.title: Wildest Places: Pacific

programme.title: Wildest India: The Himalayas: Surviving the Summits

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: New Dog in Town
programme.desc: It's Beth's birthday and Dog knows just what she needs. He surprises Beth with Delilah, a puppy small enough to sit in the palm of her hand. Beth is so happy that she insists on taking the puppy with her on today's bounty.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Trick or Treat
programme.desc: It's Halloween, and before Dog and Beth can help the kids carve their pumpkins, they have some business to attend to. It involves knocking on doors and meeting the neighbors but instead of hunting for treats they're on the search for a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Girl Trouble
programme.desc: Dog and the team have girl trouble in this case. Krystal jumped bail and seems to have vanished into the high plains of Colorado. To make matters worse, she's running with her lover (and bond co-signer) Carrie. But Thelma and Louise they ain't.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Seeing the Light
programme.desc: Today Leland and Dog make a quick visit to the police supply store to get some new gadgets for the team but they can't linger because they've also got a fugitive to catch. Their target is reputed to have an explosive temper.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: When a Stranger Calls
programme.desc: When an offender with a long record ducks his day in court, Bobby Brown knows whom to call - The Dog!? And knowing that few souls can resist Beth's clever persuasion, Dog gives her the job of luring the fugitive in.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Jack & Jill
programme.desc: Today's case is a twofer, a brother and sister both charged with drug related offenses. Also, Dog has crossed paths with the brother before. He once tried to stop Dog from arresting one of the most violent fugitives of his career.

programme.title: Dog The Bounty Hunter: Island Hopper

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Half in the Bag

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: There Will Be Flood

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Bingo Star

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Sadie's Choice

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Children of the Cornbread

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Whole Lotta Bull
programme.desc: The guys enjoy a one-day rodeo fantasy camp where they learn the ins and outs of riding, roping and clowning.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Here Comes the Son

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: Bro'd Trip
programme.desc: Jase accompanies Willie on a business trip to Arkansas to pitch a new product and has unorthodox sales strategies. Back in Monroe, Jep and Si have to track down an important item of Willie's that they accidentally shipped out.

programme.desc: Willie thinks his kids have been spending too much time on their phones and other devices so he initiates a "No-Tech Week," but when he has to participate too it ends up being harder than he thought. There's a lice outbreak at Duck Command.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty: The West Monroe Wing

programme.title: Arthur: Ants in Arthur's Pants/Don't Ask Muffy

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Plays The Blues/Buster's Sweet Success

programme.title: Arthur: Castles in the Sky/Tipping the Scales

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: There is a virus spreading through Lakewood Elementary--it’s new nicknames and it’s changing how everyone treats each other! The playground has been quiet lately--too quiet--and the Tough Customers don't like it one bit.

programme.title: Arthur: My Dad, The Garbage Man/Poor Muffy
programme.desc: Mr. Ratburn's class is taking a field trips to visit parents at their jobs. Francine's not sure she wants the class to know her dad is a garbage man. And a new carpet and a sneezing attack means Muffy must spend the weekend at Francine's.

programme.title: Arthur: D.W.'s Snow Mystery/Team Trouble
programme.desc: D.W. saves everything. But her most prized possession is a snowball from last winter. But now it’s disappeared! Then, Arthur, Francine, and Buster must do a report on ancient Rome--but can they work as a team to complete the assignment?

programme.title: Arthur: The Last Tough Customer/Brain's Chess Mess
programme.desc: The Tough Customers realize it's time to quit bullying and set out to find a new hobby--but can Molly ever truly change her ways? And Brain starts a chess club at school to improve his game and beat Los Dedos, the local chess master.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Baby/D.W.'s Baby
programme.desc: Arthur is not too sure he's ready for a new baby in the house. What do babies do besides cry? Then, living with a baby is no picnic. Just how long will Baby Kate be hanging around, anyway? And who would even miss D.W. if she ran away?

programme.title: War Story: Prisoners of the Sun
programme.desc: On 16 November 1941, two Canadian battalions arrived in the British colony of Hong Kong. Their aim: Bolster the Empire’s defenses in the event of aggression by the restless forces of Japan, stationed only kilometres away in occupied China.

programme.title: War Story: The Last Ship: The Sinking of the Esquimalt
programme.desc: On 16 April 1945, a mere three weeks before German surrender, the submarine fired a single torpedo that sank the last Canadian naval vessel lost to enemy action.

programme.title: War Story: Buchenwald Airmen
programme.desc: For two months in 1944, 168 Allied airmen were shot down over occupied France, betrayed to the Gestapo by the same collaborator, transported to the Nazi concentration and slave labour camp Buchenwald.

programme.title: War Story
programme.desc: In the longest campaign of the Second World War, from 1939 to 1945, German submarines desperately try to sever Britain’s shipping lifeline across the Atlantic Ocean. Canada plays the central role in the campaign.

programme.title: War Story: Not One Step Back: The Battle of Stalingrad
programme.desc: In the summer of 1942, the Germans advance to seize the rich oilfields of the Caucasus. In their path, the city of Stalingrad, its Soviet defenders personally ordered by Stalin to “take not one step back".

programme.title: War Story: Behind Enemy Lines
programme.desc: Royal Canadian Air Force bombing operations play a crucial role in disrupting German infrastructure ahead of the Normandy invasion of June 1944. In the process, dozens of Canadian airmen are forced to bail out over occupied Belgium and France.

programme.title: War Story: Whistle for a Tiffy
programme.desc: From D-Day, Tactical Air Force fighter-bombers played a pivotal role in Allied battlefield success; Canadian soldiers knew they could always “whistle for a Tiffy”.

programme.title: War Story: Surviving Dieppe
programme.desc: The Dieppe assault of 19 August 1942 is the worst day in Canadian military history: in just 8 hours, 907 Canadians were killed. For 2,000 of their comrades, nearly three years of incarceration in German prison camps followed.

programme.title: War Story: D-Day plus 1
programme.desc: The Canadian stand against the 12th SS Panzer Division Hitlerjugend immediately after D-Day allowed the Allies to switch to the offensive and truly begin the liberation of Europe.

programme.title: War Story: Falaise, the corridor of death
programme.desc: The Canadian army played the pivotal role in closing the Falaise Gap and ensuring Allied victory in the Normandy Campaign in August 1944.

programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers: The Game
programme.desc: Roberts and Laidlaw have uncovered a flaw in the Royal Navy’s anti-U-boat tactic ‘Buttercup’. By wargaming through different scenarios, they develop a counter-tactic of their own, Codenamed operation ‘Raspberry

programme.title: WWII Battles In Colour
programme.desc: Rare newsreel and amateur footage, newly colorised, take us inside Hitler's crumbling empire and onto the front lines of the firefight for the streets of Berlin, a battle that will determine the fate of World War II.

programme.title: Hitler's Engineers
programme.desc: Fritz Todt was the man tasked with engineering projects including the autobahn, the West Wall defences and more. But in 1942, he died under mysterious circumstances.

programme.title: Resistance: They Fought Back!
programme.desc: Resistance – They Fought Back provides corrects this myth of Jewish passivity, powerfully illustrating the uprising in ghettos large and small, rebellions in death camps, and armed resistance in the forests.

programme.desc: In the 19th century, weapons became more sophisticated and more deadly, and the results were higher casualties with devastating wounds.

programme.title: Magi-Nation

programme.title: The House on Straw Hill

programme.title: Naked as Nature Intended

programme.title: Vampyr
programme.desc: A drifter obsessed with the supernatural stumbles upon an inn where a severely ill adolescent girl is slowly becoming a vampire.

programme.title: Zelig

programme.title: Lionheart
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars as Lyon Gaultier, a member of the French Foreign Legion who deserts his post in order to come to America and help the family of his murdered brother. But crossing the U.S. without a penny to his name proves difficult.

programme.title: Machine Gun Kelly
programme.desc: The criminal exploits of Public Enemy number 1, George 'Machine-Gun' Kelly, during the 1930s.

programme.title: Inside Out

programme.title: Living in Fear
programme.desc: A newly married bride travels to her husband's hometown for the reading of his father's will. When she discovers that the townspeople suspect her husband of a murder committed twenty years ago, she has her doubts about the man she's committed her life to.

programme.title: Loophole
programme.desc: When architect Stephen Booker loses his partnership, he finds jobs hard to come by, and with money in short supply, he unwittingly becomes involved in a daring scheme to rob one of London's biggest bank vaults.

programme.title: Presumed Dead
programme.desc: An international crime novelist is the primary suspect in the disappearance of a young woman and it's up to Detective Mary Anne Cooper to piece together this bizarre missing person's case.

programme.title: Extraterrestrial

programme.title: Space Raiders
programme.desc: A futuristic, sensitive tale of adventure and confrontation when a 10 year old boy is accidentally kidnapped by a spaceship filled with a motley crew of space pirates.

programme.title: Tornado Warning

programme.desc: The Lyceum Theatre in Crewe is known for its paranormal activity and in this episode the team take the fight right to phantoms that lurk in its darkness with some frightening consequences.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Whittingdon Castle
programme.desc: The ghost of a drowned soldier awaits Yvette and her team of paranormal experts as they tackle the hauntings that plague this once magnificent castle.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Halsham House
programme.desc: Nestled into the British countryside is Halsham house where a poltergeist hides in wait for the team with frightening effect. With bones found in the attic have the team pushed it too far.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Mansion House
programme.desc: Yvette takes her fearless team to a onetime house, onetime museum and now a care home to investigate the strange goings on reported by staff and guests alike. It doesn’t take long for Yvette to regret her decision to go it alone in the cold dark cellar.

programme.title: Most Haunted: Walton Hall
programme.desc: The Most Haunted team visit a gem in the Cheshire countryside where a disembodied voice brings disarray to the investigation and something in the cellar fills Yvette with fear and dread.

programme.title: Beyond Belief: Fact or Fiction: Episode 6

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Exchange
programme.desc: Cinnamon is captured and the enemy discovers the one thing that would unmask her identity and expose the Impossible Mission Force.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Bargain
programme.desc: The former dictator of a Caribbean island is made to have hallucinatory visions in which he sees his ominous destiny as part of an ingenious plot designed by the Impossible Missions Force.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Mind of Stefan Miklos
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force is pitted against the ingenious logic of an enemy agent (guest Steve Ihnat) as the IMF attempts to lead the agent through a maze of complicated clues in order to reach a false conclusion.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Freeze
programme.desc: Before a statute of limitations expires on a 10-million dollar robbery, the Impossible Missions Force must spring the suspect from prison and dupe him into leading police to the hiding place of the money.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Test Case
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force must end the murderous career of a bacteriologist working for the enemy, who has succeeded in developing a mutant strain of a deadly bacteria which could be used as a practical battlefield weapon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hook, Line & Printer
programme.desc: A last-minute auction in Norwalk proves challenging when Ton and Allen go toe-to-toe with a real life cowboy couple. When the dust settles, the guys uncover a 3D printer and a grappling hook gun they can't wait to shoot.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Machine Gun Ton
programme.desc: Ton and Allen battle a pair of vicious female auction hunters who have an axe to grind and bid based on spite rather than strategy. And a gatling gun & suit of armor are worth much less than the guys expected.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hot Wheels
programme.desc: '70s sand rail dune racer with rally hemi heads; 1965 replica Mustang pool table; off-road racing gear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Rodeo Ton
programme.desc: 1970s El Toro mechanical bull used to train bull riders; silver WWII era banjo; a collection of 1800s handcrafted hunting duck decoys.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Risk & Reward
programme.desc: Ton & Allen arrive late to an auction. They uncover vintage bear traps and a bounty of street art. If the pieces belong to the artist, RISK, it could be their biggest score ever. If not, they'll be stuck with forged knockoffs.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Ruff Day
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to an auction in Ton's hometown and end up battling with a big-mouthed buyer. They discover a pair of tranquilizer dart guns and also end up fighting with a K9!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Space Cowboys
programme.desc: With the pawn shop history, Ton and Allen start the next chapter of their careers with a bang. They uncover an antique WWII firearm and a Russian cosmonaut space suit, which could be their biggest find to date...if it's real.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Top Gun Ton
programme.desc: Scale RC Viper FanJet aircraft with a potent jet engine; 1920s Gundlach Korona large format field camera used for photography expeditions. Ton pilots a plane, but crashes and burns.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton Voyage
programme.desc: When a ruthless storeowner seems hell-bent on stopping Ton & Allen from scoring new items in Santa Barbara they fight back. The guys uncover a rare antique air-gun and a vintage wooden boat built for speed, if it floats!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: High Flying Ton
programme.desc: A nerdy auction buyer tests Ton and Allen's patience at a big container auction in Ventura. The guys discover a basket and burners for a hot air balloon and a 19th century German single shot rifle!

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: A Sense of Evil
programme.desc: Hear from terrified people who wish their sixth sense wasn’t quite so good.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Messages From Beyond
programme.desc: A man encounters spirits in his dreams, and a teen deals with demonic messages.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: When Ghosts Get Physical
programme.desc: Witness a poltergeist become aggressive while a ghost makes a deadly return.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Face to Face With Evil
programme.desc: Watch a woman battle a predatory ghost, and see a couple’s shocking discovery.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Return of the Dead
programme.desc: Tour a haunted house and see the deadly outcome of a spirit’s search for family.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Bringing Ghosts In
programme.desc: Learn what happens when ghosts from eras past cross into our realm.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demon Unearthed
programme.desc: In the small town of Garden Grove, Iowa, Jennifer and Norman Rice with their son Andrew, purchase a majestic 19th century mansion. Soon after, Jennifer and Andrew begin experiencing paranormal activity while Norman is out of town on business.

programme.title: A Haunting: House of Nightmares
programme.desc: When Tracey Berrios experiences paranormal activity inside her new home, she suspects spirits tied to the house's history. But after something evil attacks Tracey, she fears for the safety of her family and turns to paranormal investigators for help.

programme.title: A Haunting: Evil Never Dies
programme.desc: Jennifer Hoke’s family found their dream home along the waterfront in Florida; little do they know something dark is lurking in their dream house. What starts as strange noises escalates to physical attacks. The family turns to a local empath for answers.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghosts Of War
programme.desc: When Dennis Pongratz finds his deceased father's Army belongings, he unlocks a treasure trove of WWII memorabilia, including an armband removed from a Nazi soldier killed in battle. Soon the Pongratz home becomes a battleground between good and evil.

programme.title: A Haunting: Bewitched
programme.desc: All appears to be on track when Sidney moves his pregnant girlfriend into the home he shares with his mother. But their happiness is suddenly shattered when an ex-friend is trying to tear the couple apart through witchcraft and has endangered everyone.

programme.title: A Haunting: Living Nightmare
programme.desc: Angela, a newlywed, is excited to start her new life with Stephen when nightmares that she experienced as a child suddenly resurface. Soon the menacing old hag from her dreams terrorizes her daughter and takes temporary possession of her son.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: Aang attempts to find a Firebending master to teach him while Katara learns that she possesses a special power.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: After hearing rumors about surviving Airbenders, the kids journey to the Northern Air temple to see for themselves. What they find there could spell disaster for all enemies of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids reach the Northern Water tribe, and Aang and Katara look for a Waterbending Master as Sokka falls for a princess. Zuko must find a way to continue his quest for the Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: The Northern Water Tribe braces itself for an attack by Admiral Zhao's Fire Navy fleet. Aang struggles to defend the city. He wonders if there isn't a better way to use his Avatar abilities.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Zhao's invasion breaks through the outer wall of the Northern Water Tribe's defenses, and he reveals a sinister plan. Aang goes to the spirit world for help.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: Aang and the group meet an Earth Kingdom general who wants to use Aang's powerful `Avatar State' as a weapon to defeat the Fire Nation. But it's more difficult than Aang thinks.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: On the way to Omashu, the kids meet some nomads who show them a shortcut through the `cave of two lovers'. When they get lost in the caves, they must trust in love to escape.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: The kids return to Omashu so that Aang can learn Earthbending from King Bumi; however, when they get there, they are shocked to find the city is now in Fire Nation hands.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: When the kids end up in a mysterious and strange swamp, their fears are exposed. And Aang learns about being `connected to the Earth' from an unlikely teacher.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Aang and the gang discover an Earth town that celebrates `Avatar Day'. They learn that it is not a celebration of the Avatar, but a festival of anger for something Aang did in his past.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Aliens Walk Among Us
programme.desc: Stories that suggest aliens are among us, including an Arizona woman who claims to have been fathered by an alien in a top-secret government experiment.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Curses
programme.desc: Curses: Do cursed objects really exist? This episode explores a painting in Britain that is said to start deadly house fires, a sinister doll in Florida and a curse-proof house.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Weird Animal Behaviour
programme.desc: Weird Animal Behaviour: Three extraordinary stories about the supersensory power of animals, including a psychic octopus that correctly predicted multiple World Cup winners.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Ghosts In The Machine
programme.desc: Ghosts in the Machine: Three tales of everyday objects that are haunted by the dead, including the story of a man who is attacked in bed by an invisible force.

programme.title: Weird Or What? With William Shatner: Premonitions
programme.desc: Premonitions: A look into the predictive power of the subconscious, including a man who warns of a plane crash before it happens following a series of vivid nightmares.

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: Kane

programme.title: Cash In The Attic: McNulty
programme.desc: Retired teacher Marie wants to help her children renovate their holiday home in France.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder: Glyn Dix
programme.desc: Glyn Dix met Hazel while he was serving a life term for a brutal rape and murder. After convincing her he had been framed, the couple fell for one another. But five years after his release from prison, Glyn finally showed Hazel his true colours.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Colleagues and customers at the pharmacy owned by Jessica and Mitesh Patel recall how abusive, controlling and sometimes violent Mitesh was towards his wife. But they had no idea that he was hatching a plan to brutally end the marriage.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Carole and Harry Jarvis were married for over 30 years. But he met a new woman, heiress Rita Heyster, and decided it was time to move on. In a bizarre, twisted scheme, Harry and Rita plotted to murder Carole and cover up her death.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: William Walker was a firefighter and paramedic with a reputation for helping strangers. Little wonder that debt-ridden Uloma Curry was attracted to him. Within weeks of their wedding she was plotting to get her hands on his cash.

programme.title: Meet, Marry, Murder
programme.desc: Micah Rine's family had a bad feeling about Thomas Pate. He seemed inauthentic. He had a troubled past. But nothing could persuade Micah that he wasn't the man of her dreams. By the time Micah realised Thomas had a dark side, it was too late.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Hopelessly Devoted
programme.desc: When Kaia Anderson is kind to fellow student Robert, she never imagined it will lead to a lifelong obsession that won't be stopped by reason or the law.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Gamble with Death
programme.desc: After Donna Eskew calls off her romance with Glen, he corners Donna in a casino parking lot with a chilling threat. She'll have to use all her wits to stay alive.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Cat and Mouse
programme.desc: Deborah finds herself in a fairytale romance with bad boy Steven. But after they marry, Deborah becomes a subject to daily abuse. When she leaves him, Steven stops at nothing to get revenge.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Toxic Love
programme.desc: Robin is a friendly waitress who catches the eye of a handsome customer. But after they begin a relationship, his twisted need for control bubbles to the surface.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: The Puppet Master
programme.desc: Christy Martin is the toughest female boxer in the world. But outside the ring, Christy deals with the fight of her life as she's blackmailed and abused by her husband...who is also her coach.

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Baby/D.W.'s Baby
programme.desc: Arthur is not too sure he's ready for a new baby in the house. What do babies do besides cry? Then, living with a baby is no picnic. Just how long will Baby Kate be hanging around, anyway? And who would even miss D.W. if she ran away?

programme.title: Arthur: The Hallway Minotaur/Ladonna's Like List
programme.desc: Attention Lakewood Elementary! There's a new sheriff—er--hallway monitor-in town, and his name is George Lundgren. Ladonna Compson is friendly, funny, and full of personality. Everyone likes her! At least, that's what she thought.

programme.title: Arthur: Lost!/The Short, Quick Summer
programme.desc: One day, Arthur falls asleep on a bus and awakens in a strange part of town. Will he ever find his way home? Can he keep himself from crying? Next, summer vacation is over? What about all those great, fun things Arthur intended to do?

programme.title: Arthur: The Tattletale Frog/D.W. & Bud's Higher Purpose
programme.desc: When Bud is blamed for an accident D.W. causes, she has to decide whether to let her friend take the fall. D.W. and Bud can't wait to ride a new rollercoaster. Will they make it past the ticket taker, or will they come up short?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur's Almost Boring Day/The Half-Baked Sale
programme.desc: It's raining and boy is it BORING! But then, in Grandma Thora's attic, Arthur and D.W. discover some really FASCINATING stuff about their parents. Next, Grandma Thora is helping to organize a bake sale, but her goodies aren’t very good.

programme.title: Arthur: Sleep No More/Pet Peeved
programme.desc: Buster is convinced that Pizza Paula's all-you-can-eat contest is his destiny. But how can he possibly win such an important contest without any sleep? Binky volunteers to look after Francine's cat, Nemo, for the weekend.

programme.title: Arthur: Pets and Pests/Go Fly a Kite
programme.desc: There's a mouse loose in the Read home! And D.W. wants it gone…NOW! When traps fail, Arthur enlists the help of an expert mouse catcher. While playing in the park, Binky, Muffy, and Ladonna stumble upon an abandoned kite.

programme.title: Arthur: The World Record/The Cave
programme.desc: Why is Buster walking backwards and Muffy not talking? They're trying to set world records of course! Then, Arthur thinks his class trip to the Clark Caves will be really cool--but won't it be dark in there?

programme.title: Arthur: Arthur Rides The Bandwagon/Dad's Dessert Dilemma
programme.desc: Woogles have their own names and personalities and they're so darned cute! And Arthur's gotta have one, especially now that everyone is collecting them. Arthur wouldn't mind if Dad's infamous dessert "experiments" remained a family secret.

programme.title: War Story: Falaise, the corridor of death
programme.desc: The Canadian army played the pivotal role in closing the Falaise Gap and ensuring Allied victory in the Normandy Campaign in August 1944.

programme.title: War Story: Where Hell is: The Leopold and the Scheldt
programme.desc: The Allies liberated Antwerp, the world’s largest deep-water port, on 4 September 1944, but it could only be accessed via the Scheldt Estuary, the perfect place for the Germans to make a stand.

programme.title: War Story
programme.desc: In April and May 1945, the long-suffering Dutch people, enduring the German-imposed Hongerwinter famine, enthusiastically welcomed their Canadian liberators, establishing the intense connection sustained for 70 years.

programme.title: Hitler's Last Secrets: Fatal Liaison - The Strange Affair of Adolf and Eva
programme.desc: The protracted romance between Adolf Hitler and Eva Braun began in 1929 and ended in 1945 in the bunker under the ruins of the Chancellery.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: The series begins before WWI when military commanders struggled to understand what uses aviation might have. The Wright Brothers had been the first to fly a powered aircraft in controlled flight in 1903, but even by 1914 aircraft were still underpowered.

programme.title: RAF: The Royal Air Force: Battle for the Skies
programme.desc: The 1920s and 30s were uncertain times for the RAF as well as all other armed services. With peace came cuts in spending on new aircraft development.

programme.title: Combat Trains

programme.title: Secret Wars Uncovered: Exporting Cuba’s Revolution

programme.title: How To Lose A War
programme.desc: Explore the men in charge whose rampant egos and misguided belief in their own abilities led to their country making fatal mistakes in the war.

programme.title: World War Weird
programme.desc: The Special Operations Executive, precursor to MI6, used a foul-smelling substance called 'S liquid' to undermine German and Japanese officers.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Vow
programme.desc: Megatron's plan to split up the Autobot team and defeat them individually fails when it's revealed that the minicons have their own, secret agenda.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Ring the Bell
programme.desc: Gore grapples with Varis as he looks to drop the hammer on the Hanoi!

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Sacrifice
programme.desc: Megatron sacrifices Starscream, leaving him to face the Autobots alone while the Decepticons infiltrate the Autobot base to capture the Requiem Blaster. Smokescreen sacrifices himself to try to protect the Blaster minicons.

programme.title: Kung Fu Dino Posse
programme.desc: When the dinos discover a bunch of animals run amok all over Megalopolis, they wonder why these animals have fled from the woods and entered the city. Kane figures that Skor must have something to do with it.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Mars
programme.desc: Alexis tracks a minicon in the vicinity of Mars. Starscream gets there first, but is disabled by Tidalwave. Jetfire rescues him: on the way back Starscream spots and tries to entice the minicon. But first they must get past Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Armada: Prehistory
programme.desc: The children learn more about the history of the minicons and the war. The latest minicon alert leads the team to a volcanic island: the volcano erupts in the middle of the usual 'Bot vs 'Con battle.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS: Out on a Limb
programme.desc: The duel between Playmaker and Spectre comes to a crashing conclusion as the bridge they’re battling on begins to break apart!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: On the Road Again
programme.desc: Barney and his friends have a "wheel good fun" day learning about cars. Barney creates a colorful, kid-size car, the dinos learn about seatbelt safety, and everyone discovers there are many different styles of cars.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A World of Friends
programme.desc: The children learn about many different countries while experiencing an "International Fair" on the playground.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Ahora Mismo!
programme.desc: When Ben arrives too late to get a pony ride he must learn how to wait the hard way. He's always wanted a horse and now it looks as if he's missed his opportunity. Luckily, Barney takes him to Spain where they meet Regalo, a dancing horse!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Riff has many special qualities, but sometimes, his shyness makes it hard for him to meet new friends. It’s a special day in the park as Barney and the little dinosaurs enjoy an Art Festival.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Perfectly Purple Day
programme.desc: When Sarah accidentally spills red paint into the blue paint, a mess turns into a perfectly purple day. The children paint pictures, make purple flowers and plan a purple party for their friend Colleen.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ brings his brand-new toy plane to the park. Baby Bop is having a great time playing with her homemade boat.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Puppy Love
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Mr. Boyd prepare his dog Bingo for a trip to the veterinarian for a check, while learning lessons about caring for dogs at the same time. Meanwhile, BJ is searching for his missing baseball, which he suspects was buried by Bingo.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: BJ is pretending to be a great detective, and needs a mystery to solve! Barney sees Riff protecting a nest full of duck eggs.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids take imaginary trips to different countries with the magical caboose.

programme.desc: While practicing their martial arts, Leonardo tells Splinter that he is convinced that there is one combat maneuver he has yet to teach the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Polly Wanna Pizza
programme.desc: Michelangelo returns from his sojourn to the pet shop with a monkey named Clyde. After only a few minutes with the undisciplined pet Leonardo, Donatello and Raphael demand that it be returned to the pet shop.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Mr. Nice Guy
programme.desc: Burne assigns April a story reporting on the increase in urban crime. The only problem is that urban crime is decreasing.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Sleuth on the Loose
programme.desc: While the Turtles are watching their favorite TV show April interrupts the broadcast with a special bulletin about a break-in at Dynamic Science Labs.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Rust Never Sleeps
programme.desc: Krang works on an oxidizer rocket with enough power to blast the Technodrome to Earth, but something goes wrong, and instead of thrust, the device grows rust.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): A Real Snow Job
programme.desc: The Turtles are holidaying in the Alps, as Splinter goes off to a nearby mountain to meditate. April is in an Alpine village with Irma when she notices the ice and snow melting, unusual for this time of year.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Venice on the Half-Shell
programme.desc: Krang decides to use a hydrofluxer device to flood Venice, holding it for ransom.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Artless
programme.desc: Two snobbish art-collecting aliens arrive in Florence and begin stealing great works of art.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Ring of Fire
programme.desc: Krang sends Shredder to set up a special lens that will focus the sun's rays to create a devastating heat ray.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Irish Jig Is Up
programme.desc: Krang and Shredder decide to use Ireland as their base for the Technodrome. With a device called the Rainbow Trans-Charmer, the villains intend to turn harmless little creatures like sheep and rabbits into slavering beasts.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: Dan and Athena discover that the Swarm have been absorbing vast amounts of Earth's energy, and it turns out that Magnus has been leading the Awesome Brawlers to help defend the planet.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
programme.desc: As the Awesome Brawlers train for the Battle Judgement, they learn of a new Core called the 'Nova Core'. Dan and Drago use its mysterious new powers against an unexpected opponent.

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends

programme.title: Bakugan: Legends
